title: hedeoma rubiacea
intro: Hedeoma rubiacea, also known as Redstem Hedeoma, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to North America and has been used by indigenous communities for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hedeoma rubiacea include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to alleviate headaches and reduce fever. Hedeoma rubiacea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
